name: Joe Hisaishi
abstract: Mamoru Fujisawa (Japanese: 藤澤 守, Hepburn: Fujisawa Mamoru; born December 6, 1950), known professionally as Joe Hisaishi (久石 譲, Hisaishi Jō), is a Japanese composer, musical director, conductor and pianist, known for over 100 film scores and solo albums dating back to 1981. Hisaishi's music has been known to explore and incorporate differ…

about_quotes.speaker: John Beal
about_quotes.evidence: I just got a call... for this job... Joe Hisaishi Music from the Studio Ghibli Films... I did one a few years ago in Carnegie Hall. And this is three concerts at Madison Square Garden... we’ll be honking it out there
about_quotes.doc_title: John Beal interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 18, 2024
